raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/year> Purchased airline ticket from XXXX for {$870.00} which we charged on our Citibank card. Immediately we received an email from XXXX that their billing dept. had mad an error and charged {$8700.00}, and that already had started process to correct the error and credit it back to our Citibank card. They did not. Right away in XXXX we filed a dispute with Citibank. Citibank ruled in favor of XXXX and said that we are responsible for the {$8700.00}. I have reopened the dispute 5 or 6 times including sending Citibank the email from XXXX admitting their billing error and that they would immediately correct. Each time Citibank ruled in favor of XXXX, even though when I talk to the dispute department on the phone, every person has said that we would not be responsible and they would help us get the credit back. Yesterday I sent a letter to the Executive Office of Citibank, although I have no confidence that it will help.
